notes: Single-session scenario: user asks opencode to sleep 3×1s and track progress with todowrite. The agent runs a 3-iteration tool loop (step-finish reason=tool-calls + step-start per iteration), calling todowrite each time to update todo statuses. irrlicht observes only session state transitions; individual tool calls are not surfaced as lifecycle events.

text: User prompt drives session ready → working

invariants: no state_transition to ready for session
no state_transition to waiting for session
text: Session stays working across all todowrite calls — the multi-step tool loop (step-finish reason=tool-calls → step-start) keeps the session in working throughout
Final step-finish reason=stop transitions session working → ready; no child sessions were spawned
